creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthew from comment #4)
Sorry about the long delay on this PR.  I checked and noticed pam_yubico has a newer version 2.27 already released in 2021 and submitted a PR asking maintainer approval to get it updated.

Can you please try to upgrade pam_yubico to latest version (see patch at 266100) and see if it helps with this problem?

I'm going to create a fresh VM and get pam_yubico configured to be able to reproduce the issue and then work on a possible fix.
